---
title: "Seizure Stage Descriptive Trajectories"
output: html_document
params:
  input_dir: "artifacts/manual/seizure_stage_trajectory"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/seizure_stage_trajectory"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

for (pkg in c("svglite", "ggtext", "paletteer", "patchwork")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}

library(ggtext)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  normalizePath(candidates[[length(candidates)]], winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

input_dir <- resolve_repo_path(params$input_dir, must_exist = TRUE)
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))

stage_levels <- c("pre", "LVFA", "SZ", "post")
stage_labels <- c(pre = "Preictal", LVFA = "LVFA", SZ = "Ictal", post = "Postictal")
yeo17_network_order <- c(
  "VisCent", "VisPeri", "SomMotA", "SomMotB", "DorsAttnA", "DorsAttnB",
  "SalVentAttnA", "SalVentAttnB", "LimbicA", "LimbicB", "ContA", "ContB",
  "ContC", "DefaultA", "DefaultB", "DefaultC", "TempPar"
)

read_required_csv <- function(file_name, required_cols) {
  path <- file.path(input_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(paste("Missing required seizure-stage input:", path))
  }
  df <- read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste(file_name, "is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  df
}

read_optional_csv <- function(file_name, required_cols = character()) {
  path <- file.path(input_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  df <- read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste(file_name, "is missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  df
}

as_flag <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) {
    return(x)
  }
  tolower(as.character(x)) %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y")
}

safe_mean <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  mean(values)
}

safe_median <- function(x) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  median(values)
}

safe_quantile <- function(x, prob) {
  values <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(values) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  unname(quantile(values, probs = prob, na.rm = TRUE))
}

prepare_stage <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      stage = as.character(stage),
      stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels, labels = stage_labels),
      stage_raw = as.character(stage),
      stage_order = as.integer(stage_order)
    )
}

metric_plot_value <- function(metric, value) {
  case_when(
    metric == "occupancy" ~ value * 100,
    metric == "mean_dwell_sec" ~ value * 1000,
    metric == "mean_confidence" ~ value,
    metric == "occurrence_per_min" ~ value,
    TRUE ~ value
  )
}

metric_label <- function(metric) {
  labels <- c(
    occupancy = "Occupancy (%)",
    mean_dwell_sec = "Mean dwell time (ms)",
    occurrence_per_min = "Occurrence (runs/min)",
    mean_confidence = "Projection confidence"
  )
  unname(ifelse(metric %in% names(labels), labels[metric], metric))
}

write_csv_out <- function(df, file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  write.csv(df, path, row.names = FALSE)
  path
}

bg_fill <- "#FBF7F1"
panel_fill <- "#FFFDF8"
grid_color <- "#E4DCCF"
ink_color <- "#1F2A33"
muted_color <- "#5B6670"
low_color <- "#2166AC"
mid_color <- "#F7F3EA"
high_color <- "#B2182B"
state_palette <- as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("ggthemes::Tableau_10"))

stage_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color, lineheight = 1.05),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      axis.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.34),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 10, 8, 8),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.85, "lines")
    )
}

placeholder_panel <- function(label) {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0, label = label, color = muted_color, size = 3.4, lineheight = 1.1) +
    xlim(-1, 1) +
    ylim(-1, 1) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    stage_theme() +
    theme(axis.text = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank())
}

save_svg_panel <- function(plot_obj, file_name, width = 8.5, height = 5.2) {
  output_path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  ggplot2::ggsave(output_path, plot = plot_obj, width = width, height = height, bg = bg_fill)
  output_path
}
```

```{r load-and-summarise}
segments <- read_required_csv(
  "segments.csv",
  c("patient_id", "seizure_id", "seizure_type", "recording_state", "stage", "stage_order", "duration_sec", "usable_segment", "qc_reason")
) %>%
  mutate(
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    seizure_id = as.character(seizure_id),
    seizure_type = as.character(seizure_type),
    usable_segment = as_flag(usable_segment),
    duration_sec = as.numeric(duration_sec)
  )

segment_qc <- read_optional_csv(
  "segment_qc.csv",
  c("patient_id", "seizure_id", "seizure_type", "recording_state", "stage", "stage_order", "duration_sec", "usable_segment", "qc_reason")
)
if (is.null(segment_qc)) {
  segment_qc <- segments
}
segment_qc <- segment_qc %>%
  mutate(
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    seizure_id = as.character(seizure_id),
    seizure_type = as.character(seizure_type),
    usable_segment = as_flag(usable_segment),
    duration_sec = as.numeric(duration_sec)
  )

denominators <- read_required_csv(
  "denominators.csv",
  c("metric_family", "stage", "stage_order", "n_patients", "n_recordings", "n_segments", "n_usable_segments")
) %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  mutate(
    metric_family = factor(
      metric_family,
      levels = c("seeg_stage", "paired_eeg_seeg", "eeg_microstate"),
      labels = c("SEEG stage", "Paired EEG-SEEG", "EEG microstate")
    )
  )

recording_index <- read_required_csv(
  "recording_index.csv",
  c("patient_id", "recording_state", "eligible_seeg_stage", "eligible_paired_eeg_seeg", "missing_assets")
) %>%
  mutate(
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    eligible_seeg_stage = as_flag(eligible_seeg_stage),
    eligible_paired_eeg_seeg = as_flag(eligible_paired_eeg_seeg)
  )

processing_qc <- read_required_csv(
  "processing_qc.csv",
  c("patient_id", "seizure_id", "seizure_type", "stage", "stage_order", "metric_family", "qc_status", "qc_reason")
) %>%
  mutate(
    patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
    seizure_id = as.character(seizure_id),
    seizure_type = as.character(seizure_type),
    qc_status = as.character(qc_status),
    metric_family = as.character(metric_family)
  )

patient_eeg <- read_optional_csv(
  "patient_eeg_metrics.csv",
  c("patient_id", "stage", "stage_order", "microstate", "occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min", "mean_confidence", "n_seizures")
)

patient_seeg <- read_optional_csv(
  "patient_seeg_metrics.csv",
  c("patient_id", "stage", "stage_order", "assigned_archetype", "occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min", "mean_confidence", "n_seizures")
)

loading_metrics <- read_optional_csv(
  "seeg_yeo_loading_metrics.csv",
  c("patient_id", "seizure_id", "seizure_type", "stage", "stage_order", "assigned_archetype", "network", "loading_value", "weighted_loading")
)

relationship_metrics <- read_optional_csv(
  "relationship_metrics.csv",
  c("patient_id", "seizure_id", "seizure_type", "stage", "stage_order", "field_state", "microstate", "p_microstate_given_field")
)

stage_duration_summary <- segment_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  group_by(stage, stage_order, seizure_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n_recordings = n_distinct(paste(patient_id, seizure_id, sep = "::")),
    n_segments = n(),
    n_usable = sum(usable_segment, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_duration_sec = safe_median(duration_sec),
    q1_duration_sec = safe_quantile(duration_sec, 0.25),
    q3_duration_sec = safe_quantile(duration_sec, 0.75),
    mean_duration_sec = safe_mean(duration_sec),
    min_duration_sec = suppressWarnings(min(duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE)),
    max_duration_sec = suppressWarnings(max(duration_sec, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stage_duration_overall <- segment_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  group_by(stage, stage_order) %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n_recordings = n_distinct(paste(patient_id, seizure_id, sep = "::")),
    n_segments = n(),
    n_usable = sum(usable_segment, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_duration_sec = safe_median(duration_sec),
    q1_duration_sec = safe_quantile(duration_sec, 0.25),
    q3_duration_sec = safe_quantile(duration_sec, 0.75),
    mean_duration_sec = safe_mean(duration_sec),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

timing_qc_summary <- segment_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  mutate(
    usable_label = ifelse(usable_segment, "Usable", "Excluded"),
    qc_reason = ifelse(is.na(qc_reason) | !nzchar(qc_reason), "missing_reason", qc_reason)
  ) %>%
  count(stage, stage_order, usable_label, qc_reason, name = "n_segments") %>%
  arrange(stage_order, desc(n_segments))

processing_qc_summary <- processing_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  count(stage, stage_order, metric_family, qc_status, qc_reason, name = "n_rows") %>%
  group_by(stage, metric_family) %>%
  mutate(total_rows = sum(n_rows), fraction = n_rows / total_rows) %>%
  ungroup()

processing_ok_summary <- processing_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  group_by(stage, stage_order, metric_family) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_ok = sum(qc_status == "ok", na.rm = TRUE),
    ok_fraction = n_ok / n_rows,
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

eligibility_summary <- recording_index %>%
  summarise(
    n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
    n_recordings = n_distinct(recording_state),
    n_seeg_eligible = sum(eligible_seeg_stage, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_paired_eligible = sum(eligible_paired_eeg_seeg, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_missing_any = sum(missing_assets != "none", na.rm = TRUE)
  )

if (!is.null(patient_eeg)) {
  patient_eeg <- patient_eeg %>%
    mutate(
      patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
      microstate = as.integer(microstate)
    ) %>%
    prepare_stage()

  eeg_patient_long <- patient_eeg %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c("occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min", "mean_confidence"),
      names_to = "metric",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      metric_label = factor(metric_label(metric), levels = c("Occupancy (%)", "Mean dwell time (ms)", "Occurrence (runs/min)", "Projection confidence")),
      plot_value = metric_plot_value(metric, value),
      state_label = factor(paste("Microstate", microstate), levels = paste("Microstate", sort(unique(microstate))))
    )
} else {
  eeg_patient_long <- tibble()
}

if (!is.null(patient_seeg)) {
  patient_seeg <- patient_seeg %>%
    mutate(
      patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
      assigned_archetype = as.integer(assigned_archetype)
    ) %>%
    prepare_stage()

  seeg_patient_long <- patient_seeg %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c("occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min", "mean_confidence"),
      names_to = "metric",
      values_to = "value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      metric_label = factor(metric_label(metric), levels = c("Occupancy (%)", "Mean dwell time (ms)", "Occurrence (runs/min)", "Projection confidence")),
      plot_value = metric_plot_value(metric, value),
      state_label = format_archetype_label(assigned_archetype, sort(unique(assigned_archetype)))
    )
} else {
  seeg_patient_long <- tibble()
}

projection_confidence <- bind_rows(
  eeg_patient_long %>%
    filter(metric == "mean_confidence") %>%
    transmute(patient_id, stage, stage_order, family = "EEG microstate", state_label, confidence = value, n_seizures),
  seeg_patient_long %>%
    filter(metric == "mean_confidence") %>%
    transmute(patient_id, stage, stage_order, family = "SEEG archetype", state_label, confidence = value, n_seizures)
)

if (!is.null(loading_metrics)) {
  loading_summary <- loading_metrics %>%
    mutate(
      patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
      assigned_archetype = as.integer(assigned_archetype),
      network = as.character(network)
    ) %>%
    prepare_stage() %>%
    group_by(stage, stage_order, assigned_archetype, network) %>%
    summarise(
      n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
      n_segments = n_distinct(segment_id),
      mean_loading = safe_mean(loading_value),
      mean_weighted_loading = safe_mean(weighted_loading),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      network = factor(network, levels = rev(yeo17_network_order)),
      archetype_label = format_archetype_label(assigned_archetype, sort(unique(assigned_archetype)))
    )
} else {
  loading_summary <- tibble()
}

if (!is.null(relationship_metrics)) {
  relationship_summary <- relationship_metrics %>%
    mutate(
      patient_id = as.character(patient_id),
      field_state = as.integer(field_state),
      microstate = as.integer(microstate)
    ) %>%
    prepare_stage() %>%
    group_by(stage, stage_order, field_state, microstate) %>%
    summarise(
      n_patients = n_distinct(patient_id),
      n_segments = n_distinct(segment_id),
      preference = safe_mean(p_microstate_given_field),
      joint_probability = safe_mean(joint_probability),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      field_label = format_archetype_label(field_state, sort(unique(field_state))),
      microstate_label = factor(paste("M", microstate, sep = ""), levels = paste("M", sort(unique(microstate)), sep = ""))
    )
} else {
  relationship_summary <- tibble()
}

write_csv_out(stage_duration_summary, "seizure_stage_stage_duration_by_type.csv")
write_csv_out(stage_duration_overall, "seizure_stage_stage_duration_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(timing_qc_summary, "seizure_stage_timing_qc_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(processing_qc_summary, "seizure_stage_processing_qc_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(processing_ok_summary, "seizure_stage_processing_ok_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(eligibility_summary, "seizure_stage_eligibility_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(eeg_patient_long, "seizure_stage_eeg_patient_metric_long.csv")
write_csv_out(seeg_patient_long, "seizure_stage_seeg_patient_metric_long.csv")
write_csv_out(projection_confidence, "seizure_stage_projection_confidence_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(loading_summary, "seizure_stage_yeo17_descriptive_summary.csv")
write_csv_out(relationship_summary, "seizure_stage_relationship_descriptive_summary.csv")
```

```{r build-plots}
denominator_plot <- denominators %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = n_usable_segments, fill = metric_family)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.74), width = 0.66, color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = n_patients),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.74),
    vjust = -0.35,
    size = 2.8,
    color = ink_color
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("SEEG stage" = "#235789", "Paired EEG-SEEG" = "#C1292E", "EEG microstate" = "#4C956C")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.14))) +
  labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Usable stage segments (n)", fill = "Metric family") +
  stage_theme()

duration_plot <- segment_qc %>%
  prepare_stage() %>%
  filter(is.finite(duration_sec), duration_sec > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = duration_sec, fill = stage)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.58, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.72, color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = seizure_type), width = 0.12, alpha = 0.36, size = 1.0) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = scales::label_number()) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F2C57C", "#A7C6DA", "#D08C60", "#B8C99D"), guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(CPS = "#235789", GTCS = "#C1292E"), na.value = muted_color) +
  labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Segment duration (sec, log scale)", color = "Seizure type") +
  stage_theme()

timing_plot <- timing_qc_summary %>%
  group_by(stage, stage_order, usable_label) %>%
  summarise(n_segments = sum(n_segments), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = n_segments, fill = usable_label)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.68, color = "white", linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(Usable = "#4C956C", Excluded = "#C1292E")) +
  labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Annotated segments (n)", fill = "Timing QC") +
  stage_theme()

processing_plot <- processing_ok_summary %>%
  mutate(metric_family = factor(metric_family, levels = sort(unique(metric_family)))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = metric_family, fill = ok_fraction)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(ok_fraction * 100), "%")), size = 2.9, color = ink_color) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#F1C1B5", high = "#4C956C", limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Processing family", fill = "OK fraction") +
  stage_theme()

if (nrow(eeg_patient_long) > 0) {
  eeg_plot <- eeg_patient_long %>%
    filter(metric %in% c("occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = plot_value, color = state_label)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = interaction(patient_id, state_label)), alpha = 0.16, linewidth = 0.28) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.28, size = 0.9) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = state_label), fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.05) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = state_label), fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.0) +
    facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = state_palette[seq_along(levels(eeg_patient_long$state_label))]) +
    labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Patient-level stage value", color = "EEG state") +
    stage_theme()
} else {
  eeg_plot <- placeholder_panel("EEG microstate stage metrics are unavailable.")
}

if (nrow(seeg_patient_long) > 0) {
  seeg_plot <- seeg_patient_long %>%
    filter(metric %in% c("occupancy", "mean_dwell_sec", "occurrence_per_min")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = plot_value, color = state_label)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = interaction(patient_id, state_label)), alpha = 0.16, linewidth = 0.28) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.28, size = 0.9) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = state_label), fun = mean, geom = "line", linewidth = 1.05) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = state_label), fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.0) +
    facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = state_palette[seq_along(levels(seeg_patient_long$state_label))]) +
    labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Patient-level stage value", color = "SEEG archetype") +
    stage_theme()
} else {
  seeg_plot <- placeholder_panel("SEEG archetype stage metrics are unavailable.")
}

if (nrow(projection_confidence) > 0) {
  confidence_plot <- projection_confidence %>%
    mutate(family = factor(family, levels = c("EEG microstate", "SEEG archetype"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = stage, y = confidence, color = family, fill = family)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.56, alpha = 0.35, outlier.shape = NA, position = position_dodge(width = 0.65), linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.08, dodge.width = 0.65), alpha = 0.35, size = 1.0) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("EEG microstate" = "#4C956C", "SEEG archetype" = "#235789")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("EEG microstate" = "#4C956C", "SEEG archetype" = "#235789")) +
    labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Projection/backfitting confidence", color = "Metric family", fill = "Metric family") +
    stage_theme()
} else {
  confidence_plot <- placeholder_panel("Projection confidence metrics are unavailable.")
}

if (nrow(loading_summary) > 0) {
  loading_limit <- max(abs(loading_summary$mean_weighted_loading), na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!is.finite(loading_limit) || loading_limit <= 0) {
    loading_limit <- 1
  }
  loading_plot <- ggplot(loading_summary, aes(x = stage, y = network, fill = mean_weighted_loading)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.28) +
    facet_wrap(~archetype_label, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = low_color,
      mid = mid_color,
      high = high_color,
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-loading_limit, loading_limit),
      oob = scales::squish
    ) +
    labs(x = "Seizure stage", y = "Yeo17 network", fill = "Weighted loading") +
    stage_theme() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
} else {
  loading_plot <- placeholder_panel("Yeo17 loading metrics are unavailable.")
}

if (nrow(relationship_summary) > 0) {
  relationship_plot <- ggplot(relationship_summary, aes(x = microstate_label, y = field_label, fill = preference)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.35) +
    facet_wrap(~stage, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#F4E8D0", high = "#235789", limits = c(0, NA), oob = scales::squish) +
    labs(x = "EEG microstate", y = "SEEG archetype", fill = "P(microstate | archetype)") +
    stage_theme()
} else {
  relationship_plot <- placeholder_panel("Paired EEG-SEEG relationship metrics are unavailable.")
}

qc_overview <- (denominator_plot | duration_plot) / (timing_plot | processing_plot)
trajectory_panel <- eeg_plot | seeg_plot
combined_plot <- (qc_overview / confidence_plot / trajectory_panel / loading_plot / relationship_plot) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
combined_plot <- combined_plot + plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

save_svg_panel(qc_overview, "seizure_stage_descriptive_qc_overview.svg", width = 12.4, height = 7.4)
save_svg_panel(duration_plot, "seizure_stage_duration_imbalance.svg", width = 7.6, height = 4.9)
save_svg_panel(confidence_plot, "seizure_stage_projection_confidence.svg", width = 8.4, height = 4.8)
save_svg_panel(eeg_plot, "seizure_stage_eeg_core_trajectories.svg", width = 8.4, height = 7.2)
save_svg_panel(seeg_plot, "seizure_stage_seeg_core_trajectories.svg", width = 8.4, height = 7.2)
save_svg_panel(loading_plot, "seizure_stage_yeo17_descriptive_heatmap.svg", width = 10.6, height = 6.4)
save_svg_panel(relationship_plot, "seizure_stage_relationship_descriptive_heatmap.svg", width = 9.2, height = 4.8)
save_svg_panel(combined_plot, "seizure_stage_stage_only_combined_overview.svg", width = 13.2, height = 18.2)

# Backward-compatible aliases used by earlier notes.
save_svg_panel(denominator_plot, "seizure_stage_denominators.svg", width = 8.4, height = 4.8)
save_svg_panel(timing_plot, "seizure_stage_timing_qc.svg", width = 7.2, height = 4.5)
save_svg_panel(eeg_plot, "seizure_stage_eeg_microstate_trajectory.svg", width = 8.4, height = 7.2)
save_svg_panel(seeg_plot, "seizure_stage_seeg_archetype_trajectory.svg", width = 8.4, height = 7.2)
save_svg_panel(loading_plot, "seizure_stage_yeo_loading_heatmap.svg", width = 10.6, height = 6.4)
save_svg_panel(relationship_plot, "seizure_stage_eeg_seeg_relationship_heatmap.svg", width = 9.2, height = 4.8)
save_svg_panel(combined_plot, "seizure_stage_combined_overview.svg", width = 13.2, height = 18.2)
```

```{r render-summary}
tibble(
  output = c(
    "seizure_stage_stage_only_combined_overview.svg",
    "seizure_stage_descriptive_qc_overview.svg",
    "seizure_stage_duration_imbalance.svg",
    "seizure_stage_projection_confidence.svg",
    "seizure_stage_eeg_core_trajectories.svg",
    "seizure_stage_seeg_core_trajectories.svg",
    "seizure_stage_yeo17_descriptive_heatmap.svg",
    "seizure_stage_relationship_descriptive_heatmap.svg",
    "seizure_stage_stage_duration_summary.csv",
    "seizure_stage_projection_confidence_summary.csv"
  ),
  path = file.path(output_dir, output)
)
```
